---
title: "[SickleInAfrica](https://www.sickleinafrica.org/) Data Quality Report <img src=\"assets/logo.png\" style=\"float: right;\"/>"
author: "Author: SaDACC Data Analysis Team"
date: "Report generated on: `r Sys.Date()`"
params:
  input_filename:
  output_directory:
output: 
    html_document:
        toc: true
        toc_float: true
        toc_collapsed: false
        toc_depth: 3
        number_sections: true
        theme: united

---

```{r global_options, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, fig.pos = 'h')
```

```{css toc-content, echo = FALSE}
#TOC {
  margin: 200px 20px 25px 20px;
}

.main-container {
    margin-left: 200px;
    margin-top: 50px;
}
```

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE, results="hide")
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = '../../')
```

```{r message=FALSE, echo = FALSE, prompt=FALSE, echo=FALSE, results="asis"}
source('./scripts/quality-control/quality-module.R')
```
<br>
```{r message=FALSE, echo = FALSE, prompt=FALSE, echo=FALSE, results="asis"}
#input_filename <- 'data/standard/database-ready/sparco_tanzania_registry_nodate_database_ready.csv'
import_data(params$input_filename) -> data
list(
	test_record_completeness(data),
	test_column_completeness(data),
	test_duplicates(data)) -> results
merge_boxplot_data(results) -> boxplot_data
get_composite_fivenum(results) -> total_fivenum

```
<br>

# Summary

```{r message=FALSE, comment="", prompt=FALSE, echo=FALSE, results="asis"}
get_summary_table(data, total_fivenum) %>%
  kbl() %>% 
  kable_styling()
```

<br>

# Quality Scores

<br>

```{r message=FALSE, comment="", prompt=FALSE, echo=FALSE, results="asis"}
get_quality_scores(results) %>%
  mutate(quality_score = round(quality_score, digits=0)) %>%
  kbl() %>% 
  kable_styling()
```

<br>

```{r message=FALSE, comment="", prompt=FALSE, echo=FALSE, results="hide"}
plot_quality_score_lollipop(results)
```

<br>

```{r message=FALSE, comment="", prompt=FALSE, echo=FALSE, results="hide"}
plot_quality_fivenum_boxes(boxplot_data)
```

<br>

# Completeness
<br>

```{r message=FALSE, comment="", prompt=FALSE, echo=FALSE, results="asis"}
data.frame(
  label=c('number of records with missing values', 'number of columns with missing values'),
  value=c(nrow(results[[1]]$queries), nrow(results[[2]]$queries))) %>%
    kbl() %>% 
    kable_styling()
```

```{r message=FALSE, comment="", prompt=FALSE, echo=FALSE, results="hide"}
results[[1]]$plot
```

<br>

```{r message=FALSE, comment="", prompt=FALSE, echo=FALSE, results="hide"}
results[[2]]$plot
```

# Uniqueness
```{r message=FALSE, comment="", prompt=FALSE, echo=FALSE, results="asis"}
data.frame(label=c('number of duplicated records'), value=c(nrow(results[[3]]$queries))) %>%
  kbl() %>% 
  kable_styling()
```

```{r message=FALSE, comment="", prompt=FALSE, echo=FALSE, results="hide"}
results[[3]]$plot
```


```{r message=FALSE, comment="", prompt=FALSE, echo=FALSE, results="hide"}
results[[1]]$queries %>% write.csv(paste0(params$output_directory,'records_with_missing_values.csv'))
results[[2]]$queries %>% write.csv(paste0(params$output_directory,'columns_with_missing_values.csv'))
results[[3]]$queries %>% write.csv(paste0(params$output_directory,'duplicate_records.csv'))
```
